== Notes for [[Item:Q87108|Q87108]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Munatius_Plancus

----
https://www.heritagedaily.com/2022/01/roman-amphitheatre-unearthed-in-switzerland/142560?fbclid=IwAR0kmdpf6COvxKNw5vk84q0NbA6Eg2gNN6s6EPGlbv0J8CJ5hTTtTO_oIE0

----

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
